(born 26 November 1992) is a Colombian professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who plays as a [defensive midfielder](/wiki/Midfielder "Midfielder") for [Categoria Primera A](/wiki/Categoria_Primera_A "Categoria Primera A") club [América de Cali](/wiki/Am%C3%A9rica_de_Cali "América de Cali") and the [Colombia national team](/wiki/Colombia_national_football_team "Colombia national football team").

**Rafael ledes Carrascal Ávilez** (born 26 November 1992) is a Colombian professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who plays as a [defensive midfielder](/wiki/Midfielder "Midfielder") for [Categoria Primera A](/wiki/Categoria_Primera_A "Categoria Primera A") club [América de Cali](/wiki/Am%C3%A9rica_de_Cali "América de Cali") and the [Colombia national team](/wiki/Colombia_national_football_team "Colombia national football team").
